items.title: The Life and Times of Maxis, Part 2: SimWorld
items.summary: This article tells part of the story of Maxis Software. Maxis came into 1994 riding high on the wings of SimCity 2000, the hit of the previous holiday season. items.title: The Goldilocks Principle in Fantasy Strategy
items.summary: Although I’ve played way too many games for way too many hours over the way too many years I’ve been writing these histories, it’s safe to say that I haven’t spent more time with any one game than Heroes of Might and Magic II.
